note: M382 follow-up to M381. Solo Act 1 was wiping (paladin couldn't beat goblin pair) — softened global enemy damage 0.36→0.30 and Act 1 dmg mult 1.0→0.92. Hero skill mult 0.70→0.78 so low-level skills feel meaningful again. Compensated by raising Act 4-5 dmg mults so end-game fights stay tense. NG+ Act 1 now uses the highest-act enemy multipliers (handled in code: enemyScalingForNgPlus shifts effectiveAct = min(6, act + 4*ng)).

skill.note: M382: 0.82 (was 0.70). Solo low-level players were getting wrecked because Holy Strike etc. did ~10 dmg vs 70-HP goblins. Higher mult restores low-level skill viability while still keeping AoE finishers from one-shotting Act 3+ waves.

mitigation.note: M207: both live + simulator run the WoW-style curve DR. DR = min(cap, armor/(armor+k)).

globalMultipliers.note: M382: damage 0.36→0.30 to make Acts 1-2 survivable solo. Act-specific dmg mults below compensate for Acts 3+.

ngPlus.note: M382: hpBase 1.35→2.5 and dmgBase 1.25→1.7 so NG+1 Act 1 actually feels like late-game combat. Combined with the act-shift (NG+1 Act 1 uses Act 5's actMultiplier), enemy effective HP is roughly Act 5 baseline × 2.5 in NG+1.

partySize.note: M382: enemy damage scales with party size so a solo run isn't four-times harder than a four-hero run. Companions are NOT counted toward party size for this lookup — only heroes.

companions.note: M380: companions gain these attribute bonuses per (effective level − template level). Pairs with Companion Level Sync so an L1 War Dog hired in Act 1 actually scales into late game.

affixes.note: existing affix ranges are in src/game/items.js per-act tables (AFFIXES_ACT1..AFFIXES_ACT5). Baseline leaves these in code; tuning knobs in economy/enemies sections cover the target range for M4. Tap Power affix is introduced in M3.

tap.note: M207 knob: scales tap weapon damage and tap utility magnitude at _applyTapEffect. 1.0 = baseline. M4 will tune alongside enemies.globalMultipliers.

curveDr.note: Shipped in M207 via combat.mitigation.curveDr + liveFormula='curve-dr'.

tapPower.note: Tiered affix rolls deferred past M207. Tuning done via combat.tap.globalMult for M208; full affix integration is wishlist.
